form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Only had one start last campaign 5th of 8 at this track on October 19 over 1609m, in the wet; 10 len behind Dark Viper carrying 58kg at $17. form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign third of 12 at Dundalk All Weather November 26 over 1609m, 2.75 len behind Far From Dandy carrying 63.5kg at $5.
